launchMessage: Welcome to Zobi Tech! Your all-in-one utility app.

theme.contentDescription: A versatile app offering various web-based tools and utilities.

webViews.title: SIM Tracker
webViews.descriptiveText: Track SIM card information and details.

webViews.title: Mix Data Finder
webViews.descriptiveText: Find various types of data and information.

webViews.title: CNIC Information
webViews.descriptiveText: Access CNIC information. Make sure to use VPN if site shows an error.
webViews.itemSpecificLaunchMessage: USE VPN if this site shows an error or doesn't load.

webViews.title: Whatsapp Full DP
webViews.descriptiveText: Set your WhatsApp profile picture in HD without quality loss.

dailyMessages: Tip of the day: Stay curious and keep exploring!
Remember to take a short break and stretch.
New features might be around the corner, stay tuned!
Have a productive day with Zobi Tech!
